name: Form3 Cloud-Native Payments API
what_it_does: Form3 cloud-native payment processing REST API for bank-grade payment scheme connectivity platform. Enables AI agents to manage payment submission and routing across UK Faster Payments, CHAPS, BACS, SEPA Instant, SEPA Credit Transfer, and SWIFT schemes, handle real-time payment status tracking and webhook notification, access payment scheme simulation and testing for pre-production validation, retrieve reconciliation and settlement data for financial operations, manage payment validation and enrichment for scheme compliance, handle inbound payment processing and account routing, access multi-currency payment flow management, retrieve payment analytics and volume reporting, manage payment error and exception handling workflows, and integrate core banking payment processing with treasury, accounting, and liquidity management systems.
use_cases: Processing multi-scheme payments from bank payment operations agents
Monitoring payment settlement and reconciliation from treasury agents
Simulating payment schemes for testing from payment engineering agents
Routing inbound payments from core banking automation agents
not_for: Consumer payment apps without bank-grade payment scheme connectivity
Low-volume merchant payments without multi-scheme routing requirements
Non-bank enterprises without payment scheme sponsorship or EMI license
best_when: A bank, payment institution, or large fintech using Form3 wants AI agents to automate payment submission and routing, real-time settlement monitoring, reconciliation, and multi-scheme payment orchestration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment scheme submissions are irrevocable after scheme acceptance — all automated payment submissions must include pre-submission validation and approval controls. SWIFT and CHAPS high-value payments require additional authorization controls. Payment scheme rules are complex; automated routing errors can cause payment failures and regulatory issues.

auth.notes: Form3 uses OAuth 2.0 with JWT tokens. Client credentials flow for machine-to-machine payment processing. Developer portal at form3.tech/developer. OpenAPI specification available. Payment scheme simulator for non-production testing. GitHub open-source tooling at form3tech-oss. Webhooks for real-time payment event notifications. Multi-region deployment. FCA authorized.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox environment for payment scheme simulation; production requires enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-payment transaction pricing; scheme access fees based on payment schemes required
pricing.notes: London, United Kingdom. Founded 2016. Private ($160M+ funding). Cloud-native payment processing for banks and large fintechs. Direct connections to UK Faster Payments, CHAPS, BACS, SEPA Instant, and SWIFT. Bank-grade reliability with 99.99% uptime targets. Customers include major UK banks and European payment institutions. Competes with Volante and Finastra for bank payment processing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; high-volume payment processing via scheme capacity

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Payment submissions are irrevocable after scheme acceptance; implement pre-submission validation and human approval for high-value payments
Bank/EMI requirement — Form3 customers must be FCA/PRA regulated banks or licensed payment institutions; not available to non-regulated enterprises
Payment scheme simulator — use scheme simulator for testing before production; real payment schemes cannot be tested in production without causing actual payments
Idempotency critical — implement idempotency keys for all payment submissions; duplicate submissions without idempotency keys cause double payments
Webhook sequencing — payment status webhooks may arrive out of order; implement state machine based on payment status field, not webhook receipt order
SWIFT complexity — SWIFT payment messages require MT or MX message format knowledge; Form3 provides abstraction but scheme rules still apply
agent_readiness.security_notes: Bank-grade payment processing. FCA, PSD2, PCI-DSS L1, ISO27001. OAuth2/JWT. EU/UK. Payment transaction and settlement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Bank payments. FCA, PSD2, PCI-DSS L1. OAuth2/JWT. EU/UK. Payment scheme and settlement data.
